name: stm32f407vet6_golden
description: STM32F407VET6 custom board Golden Test Suite — 9 tests via ESP32JTAG (SWD over WiFi). MCU: STM32F407VET6 (512 KB Flash, NOT 1 MB VGT6). Stage0: timer mailbox health (no wiring). Stage1: GPIO/UART/SPI loopbacks. Stage2: ADC temp, IWDG reset detect, EXTI trigger, ADC loopback. All stages verified on live hardware 2026-03-31.

deferred.reason: Requires LA frequency verification; TIM2_CLK observed at 42 MHz (half expected 84 MHz) — PLL clock discrepancy under investigation
DMA TEIF error — root cause unresolved
